name: gaming

oracle.name: stockfish
oracle.how: Read board to FEN, send over UCI; consult and explain the engine's eval in Nova's voice rather than reasoning from weights. (Chess proves the plumbing; the LoRA's judgment is proven later on oracle-less games like Clash Royale.)

_notes: Example/first expert. adapter/ + knowledge.lancedb/ are produced by training + the updater and are absent until built; this manifest is the contract the loadout-decision faculty reads now.
